# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release Workflow

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*'

jobs:
  release:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v1
        with:
          node-version: '14'
          
      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: npm install
      
      - name: Build Application
        run: npm run build
      
      - name: Create Release
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v1
        with:
          files: 'dist/*'
          tag_name: ${{ github.ref }}
          release_name: Release ${{ github.ref }}
          body: |
            Changes in this release:
            - Add your release notes here
      
      - name: Publish to npm
        run: npm publish
      
      - name: Publish to PyPI
        uses: pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@1.1
        with:
          user: __token__
          password: ${{secrets.PYPI_API_TOKEN}}
